Title: Add ogranization
Steps:
Step Description:
  1. Log in to the BackEnd.
  2. Go to the ""Contacts"" tab.
  3. Click ""Add"".
  4. Select ""Organization"".
  5. Select a user group.
  6. Enter the business category and description.  
  7. Pay attention to the ""Create"" button.
Expected Result:

The ""Create"" button is inactive because the required field ""Name"" is unfilled.

Step Description:
  1. Fill in the ""Name"" field.
  2. Click ""Create"".
Expected Result:

The new organization is created. You cand find it in the list of contacts.
Steps (Expected Result):
1.

The ""Create"" button is inactive because the required field ""Name"" is unfilled.

2.

The new organization is created. You cand find it in the list of contacts.
Steps (Step):
1.
  1. Log in to the BackEnd.
  2. Go to the ""Contacts"" tab.
  3. Click ""Add"".
  4. Select ""Organization"".
  5. Select a user group.
  6. Enter the business category and description.  
  7. Pay attention to the ""Create"" button.
2.
  1. Fill in the ""Name"" field.
  2. Click ""Create"".

Title: Add account to customer or employee
Preconditions:
Add employee [C169775] or
Add customer [C169776]
Steps:
Step Description:
1. Go to one of the contacts from preconditions. 
2. Go to the ""Accounts"" section. 
3. Click ""Add"". 
4. Select the store with which a new account will be associated.
5. Enter login.
6. Start to enter a password. 
Expected Result:
After entering the first symbol security rules to which this password doesn't comply appear.
Step Description:
1. Enter the password according to these rules. 

Expected Result:
Password security rules disappear.
Step Description:
1. To the ""Repeat Password"" field enter a value that doesn't match the password.
Expected Result:
The next red warning appears: ""Entered passwords do not match!""
Step Description:
1. Enter the correct value to the ""Repeat Password"" field. 
Expected Result:
Warning disappears. The ""Create"" button becomes clickable. 
Step Description:
1. Select roles for the new account. 
2. Click ""Create"". 
Expected Result:
The new account is created. The information matches the one you entered while creating.
Steps (Expected Result):
1. After entering the first symbol security rules to which this password doesn't comply appear.
2. Password security rules disappear.
3. The next red warning appears: ""Entered passwords do not match!""
4. Warning disappears. The ""Create"" button becomes clickable. 
5. The new account is created. The information matches the one you entered while creating.
Steps (Step):
1. 1. Go to one of the contacts from preconditions. 
2. Go to the ""Accounts"" section. 
3. Click ""Add"". 
4. Select the store with which a new account will be associated.
5. Enter login.
6. Start to enter a password. 
2. 1. Enter the password according to these rules. 

3. 1. To the ""Repeat Password"" field enter a value that doesn't match the password.
4. 1. Enter the correct value to the ""Repeat Password"" field. 
5. 1. Select roles for the new account. 
2. Click ""Create"".

Title: Add email to contact
Steps:
Step Description:
1. Go to the ""Contacts"" tab.
2. Right-click on any contact or organization.
3. Click ""Manage"".
4. Go to the ""Emails"" section.
5. Click ""Add"".
6. Enter email in the correct form. 
Expected Result:
The button ""Ok"" becomes clickable. 
Step Description:
1. Delete from the email all symbols before ""@"".
Expected Result:
The text becomes red. ""Ok"" button is unclickable. 
Step Description:
1. Enter email in the correct form. 
2. Delete all symbols after ""@"". 
Expected Result:
The text becomes red. ""Ok"" button is unclickable. 
Step Description:
1. Enter email in the correct form. 
2. Add to any place one of the invalid symbols ($+;=%{}[]|\/@ ~#!^*&?:'<>,)

The text becomes red. ""Ok"" button is unclickable.

1. Enter email in the correct form. 
2. Click ""Ok"".
Expected Result:
New email is added. Emails counter is increase by one.

1. The button ""Ok"" becomes clickable. 
2. The text becomes red. ""Ok"" button is unclickable. 
3. The text becomes red. ""Ok"" button is unclickable.

5. New email is added. Emails counter is increase by one.
Steps (Step):
1. 1. Go to the ""Contacts"" tab.
2. Right-click on any contact or organization.
3. Click ""Manage"".
4. Go to the ""Emails"" section.
5. Click ""Add"".
6. Enter email in the correct form. 
2. 1. Delete from the email all symbols before ""@"".
3. 1. Enter email in the correct form. 
2. Delete all symbols after ""@"". 
4. 1. Enter email in the correct form. 
2. Add to any place one of the invalid symbols ($+;=%{}[]|\/@ ~#!^*&?:'<>,)

Title: Entity can be found by full-text search
Preconditions:
There are some entities with different statuses.

**Note:** Not implemented for Security blade (account entity)

1. Go to the ""Contacts"" module. 
2. Enter in the search field word status and any value of the status field separated by a colon. (e.g ""status:New"" or ""status:Approved"")
3. Press 'Enter'.

Only those entities are shown that has the searched status

Title: Contact doesn't inherit organization status
Preconditions: 1. There is an organization with any status besides the "New".
Steps:
Step Description:
1. Go to the organization from preconditions. 
2. Click ""Add"". 
3. Click ""Contact"". 
4. Fill in required fields. 
5. Do not change the value in the ""Status"" field
6. Click ""Create"". 
7. Open the created contact. 
8. Pay attention to the ""Status"" field. 
Expected Result:
Status of the new contact = New. The contact did not inherit the organization status
Steps (Expected Result): 1. Status of the new contact = New. The contact did not inherit the organization status

2. Click ""Add"". 
3. Click ""Contact"".

7. Open the created contact. 
8. Pay attention to the ""Status"" field.

Title: Verify the display of the current photo in the list of customer
Expected Result: The user's photo is displayed in the header.
Preconditions: The admin has an uploaded photo for a customer in the contacts module

Title: Verify the default photo (logo) is displayed when no photo is uploaded
Expected Result: The default photo (logo) is displayed.

Title: Verify the upload photo window opens
Expected Result:
The upload and preview photo window opens.
 ![](index.php?/attachments/get/1000004680)
Preconditions: The account is active, and the 'Manage Profile' page is open.

Title: Verify uploading a new photo
Expected Result: The photo is uploaded and displayed in the preview window.
Preconditions: The upload photo window is open.

Title: Verify the list of customers updates after photo upload
Expected Result: The new photo is displayed in the list of customers instead of the previous one (or the default).
Preconditions: The photo was uploaded to the contact through icon blade

Title: Verify uploading an unsupported file format
Expected Result:
An error message appears, and the upload is not allowed.
 ![](index.php?/attachments/get/1000004684)
Preconditions: The upload photo window is open.

Title: Verify canceling the photo upload
Expected Result: The image is not uploaded, and the previous photo remains unchanged.
Preconditions: The upload photo window is open.

Title: Verify the uploaded photo persists after logout and re-login
Expected Result: The uploaded photo persists and is displayed after re-login.
Preconditions: The photo has been successfully uploaded and saved.
